use_cases: Filtering product reviews by star ratings on e-commerce platforms
Displaying rating distribution with visual progress bars in review sections
Enabling users to narrow down reviews by specific star levels for purchase decisions
ai_summary: A review filter component featuring star rating selection with integrated progress bars. Built on Radix UI RadioGroup, it displays 5-star ratings with percentage-based progress visualization and review counts. Designed for review-heavy interfaces where users need to filter content by quality ratings.
